sections.paragraph:
verb לגמד

to reduce, shrink, miniaturize, contract

verb גומד

be reduced, shrunk, miniaturized, contracted

verb להתגמד

be reduced, shrunk, miniaturized, contracted

verb לגמד (>>גימד)

to reduce, shrink, miniaturize, contract

masculine noun and adjective

dwarf, midget, gnome, lilliputian, peewee, pigmy, pygmy, runt, manikin
